title: Master v0.4.5 Access Account Action Buttons
notes:
Adds direct action buttons to Access Control account/temp key cards so accounts and keys can be selected/deleted reliably.

Changes:
- Adds Select Account button directly on account cards.
- Adds Delete Account button directly on account cards.
- Adds Select Key button directly on temp key cards.
- Adds Revoke Key button directly on temp key cards.
- Adds Delete Key button directly on temp key cards.
- Keeps the bottom Selected Access Cleanup panel.
- Keeps Discord alerts/history entries from v0.4.3.
